rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Training platform = Claude Code (CLI + Desktop) + Cowork.
Cloud/remote features carry Git dependency — out of scope for our training dir.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Supplementary does not propose remote/cloud exercise paths.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Local scheduled tasks catch up on wake, but only once, only for runs missed in last 7 days.
Verify capabilities BEFORE asserting, not after.
Maintain living capability notes for both runtimes; consult before asserting.
Compendium platform claims rot at 60 days.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Judge reads compendium; this rule governs compendium maintenance, not target file content.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Don't extend known mechanism into adjacent context without verifying it fires there.
rules_evaluated.evidence: No template/macro/syntax cross-runtime extension in file.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Fix the contract, not the broken recovery.
rules_evaluated.evidence: No defensive-recovery platform patterns in file.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Practitioner observation beats docs lookup.
rules_evaluated.evidence: No conflict between practitioner observation and docs in file.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Live-test beats docs for runtime-behavior claims.
Known correct Claude Code facts (easy to get wrong).
When tool feature behaves differently than expected, update curriculum — not student's workaround.
PreToolUse/PostToolUse hooks read env from harness, not from agent Bash subshells.
rules_evaluated.evidence: No hook env claims in file.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Auto-load surface = FOUR things — three filenames + .claude/rules/ directory.
Transcript-by-mtime selection fragile when current session writes target folder.
Compendium pointers inside files = autoload-redundant.
rules_evaluated.evidence: File is student-facing supplementary, not a CLAUDE.md or skill body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Edit-time prompt-edit gate approval detector MUST parse transcript deterministically.
rules_evaluated.evidence: No hook implementation claims in file.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Sessions = unit of work — write 'start a new session in X,' not 'open Claude Code in X.'
CLAUDE.md describes runtime, not just task.
rules_evaluated.evidence: File does not author CLAUDE.md content.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Cross-working-directory boundaries always open new; evidence travels by disk.
Same-cwd recovery defaults to --resume, not new.
F-Secure curriculum off-limits.
No premature infrastructure.
External org content.
Destructive operations need confirmation.
No as-is imports from internet.
Pseudo-URI + kill-switch for public/private content split.
Internal audit/session-retro directories default-gitignore from creation.
Quality gates run at wind-down, not mid-session.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Maintainer block explicitly defers audit to wind-down.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Tooling test layers carry acceptance-test contract.
rules_evaluated.evidence: File is student-facing supplementary, not tooling.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Script ratchet — every LLM-orchestration tooling surface ratchets toward script-replaceable assertions.
Hook lints partition into auto-fix vs warn.
Runner ↔ source pre-flight.
Judge must honor script exit codes.
Eval-fire writing-class fires must schema-validate before presenting verdicts.
Coverage tools enumerate universe, not index of past work.
Cowork sandboxed to its connected working directories.
rules_evaluated.evidence: File is AE101 (Claude Code only); no Cowork patterns.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: maintainer_acceptance = JSON-level override for accepted/mitigated judge verdicts.
Cowork capability surface — UI surfaces subagent reads; no session rename in Cowork or Desktop.
rules_evaluated.evidence: AE101 is Code-only; no Cowork claims.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Audit scope derives from TRAININGS registry + link-walk, not disk dir or tarball.
Acceptance-test contract covers (i) prompt mechanics + (ii) end-state artefacts, NOT (iii) executable shell.
Strategy-doc drift surfaces via judge citation.
Portability audits: analyze AGENT'S runtime, not prompt's literal syntax.
Skills at ~/.claude/skills/<name>/ are user-global but per-codebase in content — namespace by SUT.
rules_evaluated.evidence: No skill-authoring patterns in this file.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: state.json files written by run-mN.sh are convenience caches, not authoritative.
tmux-runner sessions must use a per-runner socket.
Source URL + type label — mandatory.
OODA paraphrase ≠ primary source.
Freshness rule — 6 months.
Zombie stat guard.
Hold short OODA loose.
rules_evaluated.evidence: This rule governs OODA cycle conduct, not target-file content.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Resist prescriptive post-OODA phrasings.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Not a research synthesis or strategy update file.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Default to asking before folding findings into strategy docs.
Vision × Detail split.
Grep continuous-research/ and memory/ before guessing at a name.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Research was conducted prior to authoring; file is a finished artifact, not a generation-in-progress.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Consult research BEFORE generating, not after.
rules_evaluated.evidence: File is finished artifact; rule governs generation workflow, not auditing it.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No 'What research says' callout boxes.
Source-verification maintainer block on any student-facing file with practitioner citations.
Each listed source carries a freshness STAMP, not just a to-do.
No placeholders inside fences.
Every prompt block: one-sentence action lead-in.
Canonical shape — lead-in, label with destination, blank line, fence.
Markdown shout inside fenced prompts = dead weight in Claude Code.
Prompts live in registry; module/exercise/lecture files reference by marker.
Forcing functions live in prompts, not body prose.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Single additive prompt (bloat-cost calc), not a forcing-function exercise; the prompt is exploratory/illustrative, not a curriculum-sequenced forcing function.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Rule in memory without forcing function = worse than no rule.
rules_evaluated.evidence: File is a supplementary reference, not a memory-rule or rule-authoring exercise.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Short skeptical pushback on 'done' = re-verify trigger.
Verification machinery needs smoke-test before trust.
rules_evaluated.evidence: No verification machinery built in this supplementary.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Context-loading tiers (auto-load / lazy-load / explicit-load).

platform_claims_checked.claim: /context already gives you the breakdown: system prompt, tools, memory files, messages, and free space.
A fresh window is the cheapest quality upgrade there is … run /clear
The subagent works in its own separate window and returns only its summary.
Everything in ./CLAUDE.md is paid on every turn of every session, because that file … loads at the top of each window.
Claude Code leans on the same idea: its search is plain grep and glob driven by the model, and Boris Cherny has said that beat a vector index.

citations_checked.claim: Chroma tested it across 18 models in 2025 and found the slide happens even on easy tasks
A 2026 study trimmed an agent's context by 23 to 54 percent on a coding benchmark, and its success rate went up.
about a sixth / almost a third — AGENTS.md output −16.58% / wall-clock −28.64%, input flat
Steve Yegge calls it living through Memento
around fifteen times the tokens of a plain chat … That number is a year old and comes from a single source
